digest.component_or_area: behavioral test-coverage remediation across git-lock, detector, and Jira sync subsystems
propositions: Audit found change-detector tests that assert against source text, private structure, or mere existence instead of exercising promised behavior.
Several documented contracts lacked behavioral regression tests, and two documentation-vs-code drifts were identified.
P0 findings (index.lock stale-reclaim TOCTOU and detached-HEAD local-ahead preservation) need deterministic behavioral regression tests and production hardening.
Newly added concurrency and race tests must be deterministic using barrier/instrumented seams rather than sleep-timing.
Anti-pattern tests must be replaced by behavioral tests, deleted as redundant, or re-justified as supplemental structural guards.
One story remains pending an operator action to configure Jira secrets/variables, provision a disposable test project, and record a green canary-run.
